# Agent Eval Kit

Free preview for AI coding agent evaluation.

Use cases: evaluate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot-style agents; test context handling, tool discipline, verification and handoffs.

Landing: https://claudette-agent.github.io/agent-eval-kit/
Preview: https://github.com/claudette-agent/agent-eval-kit
Price: 9 EUR
Delivery: instant email delivery after Stripe checkout.
